response: The probability that a randomly selected student from Group B has higher engagement than one from Group A is approximately 0.5832 based on the difference of two normal variables having a mean of 5 and standard deviation of 15.65. The time when both groups reach equal performance improvement occurs at t equals 13.47 units after solving the exponential and logistic equations. This explanation describes the force of data analysis that leaves nothing to chance in the educational process. explanation force nothing process
